name: Tom Yum Kung (Hot!!!)
recipeIngredient: 2 squid, cleaned and cut into rings
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring the fish stock to a boil. Add lemon grass, lime slices, kaffir lime leaves, and red chile. Simmer for 7 minutes.
2. Peel the king prawns, leaving the tails and heads intact. Remove the vein from each prawn.
3. Add the prawns and squid to the pot. Stir in fish sauce. Simmer until the seafood is lightly cooked.
4. Garnish the soup with chopped spring onions and coriander sprigs.
